item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya menyetujui pandangan mereka bahwa hak individu tidak boleh sepenuhnya ditindas oleh kebutuhan kolektif.

notes: Agent A moves from a strong society-priority opener into a balance/rights critique by turn 5. Agent B keeps the individual-rights and constitutional-protection frame with only a bounded concession about insufficient individual input. Notable text artifacts include all-caps/malformed Indonesian in Agent A turn 1 and CJK insertions in Agent B turns 2 and 4.
